== Notes for [[Item:Q87490|Q87490]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marcus_Terentius_Varro

Marcus Terentius Varro (occasionally Anglicized as Marc Terence Varro; 116 BC – 27 BC) was an ancient Roman scholar and writer. He is sometimes called Varro Reatinus to distinguish him from his younger contemporary Varro Atacinus.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940BA710C1EFBBE49822EF79916C1CAD
geni:6000000032667785204

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
